name: OutlookMailConnector
description: Connects to Microsoft Outlook mail via the Microsoft Graph v1.0 API. Read, search, send, reply, forward, move, and organise mail in folders for the signed-in user.

install_fields.label: Application (Client) ID
install_fields.help: Found in Azure Portal → App registrations → your app → Overview → Application (client) ID.

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.help: Generate under Azure Portal → App registrations → your app → Certificates & secrets → New client secret.

install_fields.label: Azure Tenant ID
install_fields.help: Use 'common' for multi-tenant, your Azure tenant ID for single-tenant

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Redirect URI
install_fields.help: The redirect URI registered in your Azure app. Must match exactly what is configured in Azure Portal → App registrations → your app → Authentication.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Scopes
install_fields.help: Space-separated Graph delegated permissions. 'offline_access' is required to receive a refresh token.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Authorization URL
install_fields.help: Microsoft Identity authorization endpoint. Swap 'common' with your tenant ID for single-tenant.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Token URL
install_fields.help: Microsoft Identity token endpoint. Swap 'common' with your tenant ID for single-tenant.

install_fields.label: Microsoft Graph Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the Microsoft Graph mail API. Leave blank to use v1.0.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Soft cap on outbound Graph requests per minute. Graph applies its own throttling; this guards against bursts.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates client_id/client_secret and persists install-time config. Call before OAuth authorization.

apis.name: Authorize (OAuth Code Exchange)
apis.description: Exchanges an OAuth2 authorization code for access + refresh tokens via the Microsoft Identity token endpoint.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Microsoft Graph reachability by fetching /me for the signed-in user.

apis.name: List Messages
apis.description: Lists messages in a mail folder via /me/mailFolders/{folder}/messages with optional $filter and $search.

apis.name: Send Mail
apis.description: Sends mail via /me/sendMail. Returns {} on 202 Accepted. Requires Mail.Send.

apis.name: Create Draft
apis.description: Creates a draft message via POST /me/messages without sending.

apis.name: Reply to Message
apis.description: Replies to a message via POST /me/messages/{id}/reply with a comment block.

apis.name: Forward Message
apis.description: Forwards a message via POST /me/messages/{id}/forward to a list of recipients.

apis.name: Move Message
apis.description: Moves a message to another folder via POST /me/messages/{id}/move.

apis.name: List Mail Folders
apis.description: Lists the signed-in user's mail folders via /me/mailFolders.

apis.name: Create Mail Folder
apis.description: Creates a new mail folder via POST /me/mailFolders.

apis.name: Mark As Read / Unread
apis.description: Patches a message's isRead flag via PATCH /me/messages/{id}.

apis.name: Search Messages
apis.description: Runs a $search query across the user's mail via /me/messages?$search="…".
